title: gelasine elongata
intro: Gelasine elongata, also known as the Mexican prairie onion or false onion, is a type of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of gelasine elongata include reducing inflammation and relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin irritations.
